551 P0100A_BED_RAIL_CD P0100A_BED_RAIL_CD P0100A Physical Restraints in Bed: Bed Rail Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that a bed rail(s) was used. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily
